violations.text: Wood is used in the construction of ice macinea. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025
